author: Sidhant Thole
name: Sequence-level V-shaped Curriculum + LeakyReLU² + AWQ + Cyclic Momentum + SWA
blurb: Online sequence-level curriculum learning: oversamples 2× sequences per batch, scores each by unigram entropy H(s) = -Σ p(t)·log₂(p(t)), then selects the half matching a V-shaped difficulty target d(step) that ramps easy→hard→easy aligned with LR warmdown and SWA. Unlike shard-level curriculum (which fails because we only consume ~6 of 80 shards), this operates within each batch where meaningful variance exists. Combined with LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation, cyclic momentum (0.85–0.95), and SWA. Run on 1×H100 due to compute constraints. Built upon PR #623.
